reviews.comment:
Mala atención no les interesan los socios,sus servicios son deficientes ,cargar combustible se vuelve en siglos,si te gusta bien y si no te vas horrible experiencia el automóvil club de la falda

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, they don't care about their members, their services are deficient, refueling takes ages. If you like it, fine, but if not, leave. A horrible experience at the La Falda Automobile Club.
